article.title: ‘Slow-cial’ app Roost forces you to slow down to the speed of a carrier pigeon
article.description: This developer didn't expect his side project to grow to 300,000 users, but people love Roost because it's an alternative to an always-on, fast-paced online culture.

generated.caption:
Feeling overwhelmed by the constant online hustle? 😫

A new "slow-social" app called Roost is offering a calmer alternative. It intentionally slows down interactions, mimicking the speed of a carrier pigeon, and has already attracted 300,000 users tired of fast-paced digital life.

Save this post and share it with a friend! Follow @CyberShieldAlerts for daily updates.
generated.script: Are you overwhelmed by the relentless speed of social media? A new 'slow-cial' app called Roost is attracting 300,000 users seeking a different pace. This side project, designed for mindful interaction, literally slows you down to the speed of a carrier pigeon. It's gained popularity as a powerful alternative to our always-on, fast-paced online culture. Roost shows us there's a demand for connection without the constant pressure. Ready for a break from the digital rush? Look into Roost now.

slides.text: Tired of the Digital Rush? Meet Roost, the 'Slow-cial' App!

slides.heading: Overwhelmed by Always-On?
slides.text: Many feel exhausted by the constant demand for instant connection in our fast-paced online world.

slides.heading: Slowing Down, Like a Pigeon
slides.text: Roost offers a unique alternative, forcing you to communicate at the unhurried speed of a carrier pigeon.

slides.heading: An Unexpected Success Story
slides.text: What started as a developer's side project has unexpectedly grown to attract 300,000 users!
